main.name: Shuang Chen
main.description: specializing in LLM applications, RAG pipelines, and cloud-native AI services. Proficient in Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, React, FastAPI, LangChain, and AWS
main.bio: I am Shuang Chen, an AI Engineer with a strong full-stack background. I architect enterprise AI chatbot platforms, design RAG pipelines with semantic search, and build scalable cloud-native AI services. Passionate about leveraging LLMs and conversational AI to solve real-world problems.
main.contactmessage: Feel free to reach out about AI engineering or software development opportunities!

resume.skillmessage: AI/ML Engineering | Full-Stack Development | Cloud Infrastructure

education.degree: Master of Science in Information Technology
education.description: Merit-based scholarship recipient, GPA 3.85/4.0. Key courses: Database Development, Machine Learning for Business, System Design, Algorithms & Data Structures.

education.school: East China University of Science and Technology
education.degree: B.S. in Business Management (MIS), Minor in German
education.description: Three-year scholarship recipient, captain of the tennis team. Cross-industry experience spanning e-commerce, education, consulting, and IT.

work.title: AI Engineer
work.description: Architecting enterprise-grade AI chatbot platforms using Streamlit, LangChain, FastAPI, OpenAI APIs, and vector embeddings. Designing RAG pipelines with semantic search and context engineering. Building scalable cloud-native AI services on AWS ECS, Lambda, S3, and RDS.

work.title: Senior Software Engineer
work.description: Designed AI-powered conversational systems for Intel Maestro using NLP, LLM orchestration, and prompt engineering. Developed Python and FastAPI backend services supporting distributed GPU infrastructure management. Led migration of high-availability infrastructure from Europe to U.S.-based cloud environments.

work.title: Senior Software Engineer
work.description: Developed scalable enterprise applications for major financial platforms. Implemented reusable frontend architectures and API integrations with high availability. Integrated AI-assisted testing tools including Applitools and Cypress to automate visual regression testing.

work.title: Front End Engineer
work.description: Implemented scalable micro-frontend SPA architectures using React, Angular, and Vue. Developed RESTful APIs and optimized backend query systems with TypeScript, reducing response latency by over 50%. Built reusable enterprise UI component libraries.

projects.title: Enterprise AI Chatbot Platform
projects.category: AI chatbot platform using Streamlit, LangChain, FastAPI, and OpenAI APIs for natural language interaction with financial datasets at Fannie Mae.

projects.title: Intel Maestro AI Conversational System
projects.category: AI-powered conversational system using NLP and LLM orchestration for enterprise support operations at Intel.

projects.title: TDM One Source - Capital One
projects.category: Internal testing platform for managing credit card rewards and adjustments, built with Angular and AI testing frameworks.

projects.title: Tennis Coach Finder
projects.category: Full-stack web and mobile app connecting students with tennis coaches. React/Vite frontend, Express backend, Expo mobile app with Stripe integration.

testimonials.text: Ever tried. Ever failed. No matter. Try again. Fail again. Fail better.
